raw_consumer_statement:
I requested an appeal due to the new information we received through mail from Citibank dated XX/XX/year>. In this packet, there are documents from XXXX XXXX XXXX that are falsified and untrue, including one with a forged signature.

This dispute had originally been closed because I could not provide a valid credit slip. I contacted Citibank to explain that I could not obtain a valid credit slip because the merchant refused to provide me with one. The dispute was supposed to be re-opened by Citibank representative XXXX, but it was not re-opened. Instead, I received a letter explaining that the dispute would be closed due to the amount of time that had passed. 

XXXX XXXX XXXX has been claiming that we did not cancel our stay, they say we stayed for 7 nights but we only stayed for 1 night Here is a summary of the dispute Online booking made for XX/XX/year> - XX/XX/year> Arrived at XXXX XX/XX/year> -we were not given the room we booked online -due to the unsanitary/contaminated conditions of the room they gave us, we were offered a different room but at a lower rate, we were still not offered the room we originally booked online -we were refused a refund of the difference in the rate Cancelled our stay at XXXX XX/XX/year> -due to the unsanitary/contaminated conditions of the second room, we had no choice but to cancel our stay -we spoke with XXXX the Supervisor about the problems with both rooms ( mold, stains, bug infestation ) but she refused to offer help or a resolution -the XXXX XXXX website is misleading and advertised falsely by stating they are 5-star -XXXX  refused to give us a refund -XXXX  refused to send us a cancellation email, therefor I can not provide proof of cancellation -we refused to sign paperwork upon our departure XXXX XXXX XXXX  said that we stayed XX/XX/year> through XX/XX/year> We left on XX/XX/year> We are being forced to pay for a hotel room that we did not use I have attached receipts from the hotels we stayed at XXXX also lied by saying he enjoyed services and does not make any complaint about it We have numerous photos and videos to prove the disgusting condition of the rooms Citibank rejected our photos and videos due to not having the software to open them How is it fair that proof can not be submitted?! 

XXXX did not provide us with the accommodations/services promised to us at the time of booking XXXX lied and falsified documents, also forged one of our signatures I called Citibank to request an appeal on XX/XX/year> immediately after receiving these documents in the mail. Citibank is now ignoring my request.
